summary: Full frontend verification of the two new LP SmartSide Material-List features on fixture EST-910869-L: (1) Confirm-Openings review card + (2) Verification-trail line on printed material list PDF + contractor-only constraint. ALL PASS end-to-end. Fixture restored to clean state (all 20 openings unconfirmed, all 4 amber locations unverified, tier Contractor).
critical_code_review_comments: OpeningsReviewCard.jsx swallows all API errors silently (catch {}) — a failed POST to /openings-review leaves the UI in a partial state (busy cleared, but no user feedback). Consider a toast on failure, mirroring how QuoteModal handles freeze errors.

handlePrintMaterials in EstimateEditor.jsx (lines 290-304) freezes on every print attempt — that's ruled behavior, but the freeze POST body sends colors/substitutions but NOT the current openings-review state; the frozen /m/{token} view uses whatever the server already has. That's actually correct (freeze is server-side) but worth documenting; a stale client with pending openings actions in-flight could freeze mid-derivation. Not seen in this run.

The 'gable-area consistency FAILED' console errors for walls front/back/left fire on every LP estimate open — these are noisy dev-only assertions that spam the console. Consider gating with a debug flag.
seed_data_creation: One material-list share token minted (YX9l7xp5xy1RcEKH6lrbET3--PJx0iWU) via the MATERIAL LIST print flow — expected behavior per QR doctrine. NOT revoked (harmless, frozen snapshot).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fixture EST-910869-L is confirmed clean: 0/20 openings reviewed, 0/4 amber verified, Cap window=18, Cap patio door=2, tier=Contractor. All new-feature testids stable: lp-openings-review-card, lp-or-summary, lp-or-toggle, lp-or-item-{key}, lp-or-confirm-{key}, lp-or-wrong-{key}, lp-or-correct-select-{key}, lp-or-done-{key}, lp-or-corrected-{key}. Verification-trail HTML is produced by /app/frontend/src/lib/lpMaterialList.js lines 95-110 and rendered honestly (partial states as partial, never suppressed).

test_results_detail.1_openings_card_render: PASS — 20 items rendered with photo thumbnail + elevation tag + type/size + Confirm + Wrong-type buttons. Summary read '0/20 reviewed · 20 unconfirmed' initially.
test_results_detail.2_confirm_and_reset: PASS — Confirm on open:8ddb8932:0 → summary flipped to '1/20 reviewed · 19 unconfirmed', green lp-or-done button appeared; clicking it reset back to '0/20 · 20 unconfirmed'.
test_results_detail.3_wrong_type_correction_count_shift: PASS — Wrong type on open:8ddb8932:1 → chose Patio slider → 'Corrected: Window → Patio slider' label appeared; Cap window dropped 18→17 and Cap patio door rose 2→3 (matches ruled behavior exactly). Reset restored 18/2. Fixture left clean.
test_results_detail.4_collapse_toggle: PASS — lp-or-toggle collapsed the list to 0 items; expanded back to 20.
test_results_detail.5_verification_trail_in_pdf_html: PASS — Intercepted POST /api/estimates/{id}/pdf body contains 'Verification trail' block. Amber line: 'amber: 0/4 field-verified — UNVERIFIED: left dormer left post; right edge of set-back upper-story wall rising above the lower roof (WALL REF wa; clerestory pop-up left corner post; clerestory pop-up right corner post'. Openings line: 'openings: 0/20 reviewed — 20 UNCONFIRMED'. Both counts/statuses reported honestly (partial as partial, never suppressed).
test_results_detail.6_public_page_purity: PASS — /m/YX9l7xp5xy1RcEKH6lrbET3--PJx0iWU contains NO Verification trail, NO UNVERIFIED/UNCONFIRMED, NO 'Confirm openings', NO 'FIELD VERIFY', NO 'amber' text. Only contractor-tier line data + 'PRICING PENDING' badges. Public JSON /api/public/lp-material-list/{token} top-level keys: [frozen, meta, printed_at, newer_available, current]. Keys 'openings_review', 'amber_items', 'verification_trail', 'unit_cost', 'dealer_cost' ALL absent.
test_results_detail.7_regression_amber_field_verify: PASS — lp-field-verify-card renders 4 unverified locations. Verified 'corner:osc:left-dormer-left-post' → green lp-fv-verified appeared → clicked to revert → back to unverified. All 4 restored.
test_results_detail.8_regression_material_table_pricing: PASS — Contractor-tier 38 Series Lap unit $30.99, line $6,136.02 (matches iter38 baseline). 12 pending lines display 'PRICING PENDING' (never $0). Materials total $12,074.21.
